## Summary

## Trust Boundary

- [ ] No real secrets, `.env` values, private keys, OAuth URLs, customer data, provider logs, or raw transcripts added.
- [ ] Memory mutation actions remain scoped or review-gated.
- [ ] Source-backed claims cite repo docs, tests, git, CI, provider state, or live proof.

## Verification

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run pack:dry`

- local:
- committed:
- pushed:
- deployed/live:
